title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, reduce token spend, and extend Claude's capabilities with web scraping, media generation, and model switching. Plugins include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Higgsfield, Compound Engineering, Anthropic-provided tools, and others for debugging, cost monitoring, and multi-model access.
